leagueBriefing: Rayo Vallecano salvaged a point at home against bottom-dwelling Levante, extending their unbeaten streak while leaving the visitors stuck in the relegation zone.

games.headline: Ciss rescues point for Rayo Vallecano in late drama against Levante
games.brief: Rayo Vallecano maintained their six-game unbeaten run in La Liga, but they had to work for it after falling behind to a disciplined Levante side. Carlos Espí opened the scoring for the visitors just before halftime, threatening a major upset at the Estadio de Vallecas. However, Pathé Ciss proved to be the hero for the hosts, striking a contested equalizer in the fourth minute of stoppage time to break Levante hearts and ensure the spoils were shared.
bullets: Pathé Ciss scored a dramatic equalizer in the 94th minute, his first goal since returning from a knee injury.
Carlos Espí gave Levante the lead in the 41st minute with a clinical finish assisted by Iker Losada.
The result extends Rayo Vallecano's unbeaten league streak to six matches, moving them up to 13th in the table.
Levante remains at the bottom of the standings, five points adrift of safety despite taking seven points from their last nine available.
Rayo Vallecano dominated possession with 61% but struggled to break down a stubborn Levante defense until the final moments.
games.context: The draw keeps Rayo Vallecano comfortably mid-table while Levante faces an increasingly uphill battle to avoid relegation with only 10 games remaining.
